imageurl.title: Python FullStack Certification
imageurl.description: Validates expertise in Python full-stack development, including backend frameworks, frontend integration, databases, and deployment.

imageurl.title: Automotive Service Certification
imageurl.description: Demonstrates technical knowledge in automotive diagnostics, maintenance procedures, and vehicle systems.

imageurl.title: Postman Certification
imageurl.description: Showcases skills in API testing, automation, RESTful services, and workflow management using Postman.

imageurl.title: AI Certification
imageurl.description: Covers artificial intelligence fundamentals, machine learning concepts, and real-world AI applications.

imageurl.title: Agile Project Management Certification
imageurl.description: Validates knowledge of Agile methodologies, Scrum practices, sprint planning, and iterative delivery.

imageurl.title: Data Science Certification
imageurl.description: Demonstrates expertise in data analysis, visualization, statistics, and predictive modeling.

imageurl.title: Cyber Security Certification
imageurl.description: Focuses on cybersecurity principles, threat detection, risk management, and data protection.

imageurl.title: React Native Certification
imageurl.description: Proves skills in building cross-platform mobile apps using React Native, including components, hooks, and APIs.

imageurl.title: JasperSoft Certification
imageurl.description: Validates expertise in JasperSoft reporting, report design, and enterprise data solutions.

imageurl.title: MongoDB Certification
imageurl.description: Demonstrates knowledge of MongoDB, including schema design, queries, indexing, and performance optimization.

description: A curated collection of professional certifications covering software development, AI, data science, cybersecurity, and modern development tools. These certifications reflect strong technical expertise and continuous learning across multiple domains.
